title: Ongoing Contraction In Steel Production Outside Of China
section_path: Ongoing Contraction In Steel Production Outside Of China
section_path_text: Ongoing Contraction In Steel Production Outside Of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, steel production outside of China totaled approximately 65.8 million tons in February. This is down month-on-month by 3.7 million tons (-5%) and is down year-on-year by 1.8 million tons (-3%). Overall, the global economy outside of China remains a concern of ours.
